Package fun.gen

Class RecordGen

java.lang.Object
fun.gen.RecordGen
All Implemented Interfaces:
Gen<Map<String,?>>, Function<RandomGenerator,Supplier<Map<String,?>>>
public final class RecordGen extends Object implements Gen<Map<String,?>>
represent a generator of a Map.
